title: Furby returns! Toymaker Hasbro resurrects hairy robot doll to mark 25 years since release
text: The cuddly doll will be available for sale on Amazon beginning July 15, toy maker Hasbro announced.

title: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth™ Now Available
text: RENTON, Wash.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #MTGxLOTR--Wizards of the Coast, a division of Hasbro, Inc. (NASDAQ: HAS), has released the highly anticipated Magic: The Gathering set. This Universes Beyond card set combines Magic's deep and strategic gameplay that players love with characters and settings from the classic trilogy from J.R.R. Tolkien for a one-of-a-kind experience in Middle-earth. With The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth™, players will join the Fellowship and relive or create their journey throu.

title: Hasbro is bringing back the Furby again. But this time they'll have an off switch.
text: Hasbro is releasing a new Furby for the 25th anniversary of the toy's original release. Furbys were popular in the late '90s, selling 40 million toys in the first three years.

title: Hasbro (HAS) to Relaunch the Interactive Toy Furby This Summer
text: Hasbro (HAS) gears up to relaunch its interactive toy friend, Furby, in two new colors. The toy is set to be available from Jul 15.

title: Furby Is Back! Hasbro Announces the Toy's Iconic Return With a Fresh New Look
Hasbro Sponsors Special Olympics World Games Bringing the Power of Play and Inclusion to All
text: PAWTUCKET, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hasbro, Inc. (NASDAQ: HAS), a toy and game company, today announced its support for the upcoming Special Olympics World Games, held in Berlin June 17-25, 2023. Hasbro's long-standing global partnership with Special Olympics is empowering athletes and students with and without disabilities and ensuring they have the same access to inclusive play and sports in classrooms and communities around the world. title: 11 Buyable Inflation-Busting June Dividend Stocks
text: March-April 2022, UBS, Kiplinger, and Barron's analysts/reporters listed five sets of stocks sorted as “Inflation Busters.” Those five-articles revealed 48 equities, with 43 paying-dividends. This over one-year-old list continues to beat-back new-strains-of-inflation.

title: WS Game Company Creates Custom-Illustrated MONOPOLY Game for Hasbro's 100th Anniversary
text: MANCHESTER-BY-THE-SEA, Mass.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--WS Game Company and Hasbro partnered for a limited-edition Monopoly in honor of Hasbro's 100th anniversary.

title: How Hasbro Plans to Revive Its Toy Business
text: The maker of Monopoly, Play-Doh and Transformer action figures says part of the strategy is to win a bigger share of the preschool market.
